arts.ttl: Man United 'send out SOS call to university students to help predict injuries to new signings'
arts.sum: Manchester United have reportedly approached the University of Manchester for assistance with predicting injuries to new signings.

arts.ttl: Former Man Utd CEO Ed Woodward makes SHOCK Premier League return
arts.sum: Former Manchester United CEO Ed Woodward is set to join Crystal Palace minority owner Eagle Football Group, according to a report. According to Sky News and L'Equipe, Woodward is set to join the board of Eagle Football Group, which owns Lyon, Molenbeek, Botafogo and a minority stake in Crystal Palace .

arts.ttl: Dan Ashworth to show Man United true colours after transfer regret as big move emerges
arts.sum: Former Manchester United sporting director Dan Ashworth has been linked with Arsenal where he can show what the Reds are missing.
